sections.section_title: Chapter X Regulatory Restrictions and Limits

policies.policy_description: Regulatory restrictions on exposure to sensitive sectors such as capital market and commercial real estate.
policies.objective: To ensure prudent risk management and maintain financial stability

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: NBFCs shall fix board-approved internal limits for SSE separately for capital market and commercial real estate exposures.

compliances.SectionTitle: Chapter X Regulatory Restrictions and Limits
compliances.Description: NBFCs shall fix board-approved internal limits separately for capital market and commercial real estate exposures.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from Chapter X Regulatory Restrictions and Limits - Sensitive Sector Exposure (SSE) Policy
compliances.ComplianceTitle: Fix Board-Approved Internal Limits for SSE
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: NBFCs shall fix board-approved internal limits separately for capital market and commercial real estate exposures.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Fix Board-Approved Internal Limits for SSE' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Sub-limits within Commercial Real Estate Exposure Ceiling
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: A sub-limit within the commercial real estate exposure ceiling shall be fixed internally for financing land acquisition.
